title: ReceiptOS Issuance Result Commitment v0
description: Stored issuance_result_commitment.v0 artifact for unanchored issuance-time witness v0. issuance_result_root is required on the stored artifact and is excluded from its own deterministic recomputation. JSON Schema cannot verify root recomputation or root equality. Recomputation uses the exact three-field root body consisting only of schema, issuance_intent_root, and verdict_commitment. issuance_intent_root must refer to an intent-kind issuance_record.v0, but cross-artifact kind and equality checks remain verifier/vector rules. No timing, witness, admission, scoring, or verdict-interpretation field belongs in this artifact.
